heading: Featured automations
subtitle: A look at real workflows I've built and the impact they deliver.

items.name: Lead Qualification AI
items.problem: Sales reps spend hours manually scoring and routing inbound leads.
items.solution: An AI agent scores every lead, enriches it, and routes hot prospects to reps instantly.

items.name: Invoice Processing
items.problem: Finance manually keys invoice data and chases approvals over email.
items.solution: Invoices are parsed, validated, and pushed to accounting with automatic approval routing.

items.name: Customer Support AI
items.problem: Support tickets pile up overnight and on weekends.
items.solution: A GPT assistant resolves common tickets instantly and escalates the rest with full context.

items.name: CRM Sync
items.problem: Data lives in five tools and none of them agree with each other.
items.solution: A two-way sync keeps contacts, deals, and notes consistent across every platform in real time.

items.name: Appointment Booking
items.problem: Back-and-forth scheduling delays bookings and frustrates clients.
items.solution: Leads self-book qualified slots; reminders and follow-ups fire automatically.

items.name: Employee Onboarding
items.problem: New hires wait days for accounts, docs, and access to be set up.
items.solution: One trigger provisions accounts, sends docs, and assigns onboarding tasks across tools.
